work_unit: MM-L003 factor-adapter budget_per_stock edge case clamp
situation: audit-2026-07-04-002 finding MM-L003 (priority 17, route-fix): moni-rs/crates/moni-factor-adapter/src/lib.rs L147 divides budget_per_stock by raw top_n, but iteration via take(top_n) yields at most ranked_symbols.len() items. When caller requests top_n > available symbols, each slot is under-funded and valid buys are silently skipped. Derived fix from deep audit cycle.
action: Introduce effective_top_n = top_n.min(ranked_symbols.len()) at function entry; replace all downstream uses of raw top_n (top_set construction, zero-guard, budget division, buy-loop take) with effective_top_n. Add regression test generate_rebalance_orders_clamps_top_n_to_ranked_len asserting both symbols receive correctly-sized buys when top_n=10 but only 2 symbols exist.
outcome_evidence: cargo test -p moni-factor-adapter in worktree: 7 passed; 0 failed (including new clamps_top_n_to_ranked_len regression). Commit 6eb3e5d pushed to origin/auto/opt-moni-master-1783105913. opt-worktree.sh reused same-area worktree (route-fix).
next_suggestion: 派生 fix MM-L004 (priority 18): llm.rs L185 regex recompilation in hot path → OnceLock/lazy_static. 同 area route-fix，可继续复用 opt-moni-master-1783105913。

audit_findings.finding: budget_per_stock divides by raw top_n while iteration caps at ranked_symbols.len(); over-large top_n silently under-funds each slot and skips valid buys
audit_findings.remediation: Clamp effective_top_n = top_n.min(ranked_symbols.len()) and use consistently for budget division + iteration
